title: [Archived] Wulfhunter's: Contagion
description: A modpack built around Harbinger's Fungal Infection: Spore Mod
body:
This modpack was built around the Fungal Infection: Spore mod by Harbinger and Timeless and Classic Zero by CraneBlock6666. Fight against the raging fungus outbreak using anything you can get your hands on!

**MAY BE CONSIDERED FRIGHTENING FOR CERTAIN AUDIENCES**

Server ready and created with multiplayer in mind, upload it or play singleplayer works either way!

~~More updates and improvements on the way, if you have suggestions or comments on ways to improve the pack, they are greatly appreciated!~~

This Pack is no longer being maintained.
